$comment: Current-state internal link graph for the Zabble pre-launch Nuxt site. Derived by STATIC ANALYSIS of the prerender source (app/pages/**, app/components/**, app/data/systems.ts) because no crawlable build exists yet (pre-launch; staging URL is blocker B3; live DataForSEO On-Page returned HTTP 401 in this session — env not loaded). The prerendered HTML is generated deterministically from these files, so source analysis is the authoritative pre-launch method. See link-graph__zabble__static.note.md for method + reproduction.

TheNav.note: Logo + 'Home'/'What We Build'/'Use Cases'/'Contact' resolve to '/' via hash. 'Systems' -> /systems. CTA -> /diagnose. No module-level links.

TheFooter.note: CRITICAL: footer has NO link to /systems and NO module links. Footer link equity never reaches the money-page cluster.

/.note: Home BODY links only to /diagnose + same-page anchors. TheWhatWeBuild (the 4-pillar section) links to NOTHING. Only Home->/systems edge is the global nav. No body link to any module or pillar.

/systems.note: Only LIVE systems are rendered (index.vue line 50: filter status==='live'). The 2 concept systems are NOT linked here. Card anchor text is generic ('View system' / aria 'View <name>'). Pillar chips link to faceted query-param URLs, not hub pages.

/systems/[slug].note: Breadcrumb is a single back-link '<- All systems' (NOT a Home>Systems>Name trail, no BreadcrumbList schema). SystemHero pillar chips -> faceted /systems?pillar=. ZERO links to sibling/related modules. Each module page is a near-dead-end.

in_degree_summary./: sitewide (nav logo + footer on every page)
in_degree_summary./systems: sitewide nav on every page = well linked
in_degree_summary./diagnose: sitewide nav CTA + multiple body CTAs on every page = over-linked relative to money pages
in_degree_summary.each_pillar_facet: 4 (chips on /systems + chips on each module hero)

issues_detected.detail: 2 concept pages (/systems/legal-intake-automation, /systems/hospitality-booking-marketing-dashboard) render with TODO placeholder copy but are linked from nowhere; [slug].vue has no status guard so they resolve (200) with thin content.

Every live module page has in-degree 1 (single card on /systems) and out-degree 0 to siblings. No hub-and-spoke depth; link equity cannot flow between related modules; no topical clustering by pillar.

No indexable pillar hub URLs. The 4 pillars exist only as faceted ?pillar= filters with no unique content; topical authority for Automation/Audit Trails/Anomaly Detection/Analytics has no anchor page.
Footer omits /systems and all modules; a sitewide module/pillar link block is the cheapest way to raise module in-degree and flatten depth.
/systems?pillar=<slug> (x4) are crawlable filtered duplicates of /systems with no unique content -> dilution / potential cannibalisation of /systems.
Primary money-page anchor is generic ('View system' / 'View <name>'); no descriptive, keyword-aligned anchor text into module pages.
/systems index title 'Systems · Zabble' + module meta derive from tagline only (handed to S02/S06); structural risk of thin/duplicate meta across 30 same-shaped pages.
